vocab.meaning: bắt đầu dấn thân vào một sự nghiệp
vocab.example: I have recently embarked on a career in digital marketing, which has been both challenging and rewarding.

vocab.meaning: khối lượng công việc lớn/nặng nề
vocab.example: As a final-year student, I’m currently grappling with a heavy workload consisting of my thesis and several internships.
My current role allows me to sharpen my professional expertise in financial auditing on a daily basis.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi giáo dục bậc cao (đại học, sau đại học)
vocab.example: I decided to pursue higher education abroad to broaden my horizons and access better research facilities.
Instead of a traditional degree, I opted for vocational training to gain practical skills in graphic design.

vocab.meaning: môi trường (làm việc/học tập) nhịp độ nhanh/áp lực
vocab.example: Working in a fast-paced environment like a startup requires immense adaptability and quick decision-making.

vocab.meaning: sự xuất sắc trong học tập
vocab.example: I always strive for academic excellence, as it is a prerequisite for securing a scholarship at top-tier universities.

vocab.meaning: con đường sự nghiệp đem lại thu nhập cao
vocab.example: Software engineering is widely considered a lucrative career path in the current digital era.
I am currently juggling my studies with an internship placement at a prestigious law firm.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng bộ kỹ năng của ai đó
vocab.example: My job provides me with numerous opportunities to broaden my skill set, especially in terms of soft skills.
